audience_policies.source_phrase: Advance reservations are no longer required or accepted. This pass admits up to three (3) visitors at half-price admission. You will receive a coupon that you can present to staff on the day of your visit.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Advance reservations are no longer required or accepted. This pass admits up to three (3) visitors at half-price admission. You will receive a coupon that you can present to staff on the day of your visit.
